data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation that weather conditions (temperature, precipitation, wind) are auto-captured. While the linked use case mentions that weather is 'auto-logged: 68°F, clear', it does not provide evidence of the system's capability to capture all required weather conditions automatically, particularly precipitation and wind. This indicates a gap in the requirement as it does not confirm full coverage of the specified weather conditions.
gaps: No evidence of automatic capture of precipitation and wind conditions.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
